about.title: About
about.bio1: Driven by a passion for technology, I put my skills to work on concrete and ambitious projects. I place just as much importance on code quality as on the final user experience.

items.title: Luwaas
items.desc: A SaaS platform for property management tailored for landlords and tenants. Luwaas streamlines rent tracking, lease contract management, and payment monitoring — built for the African real estate market

items.title: Sunu Lekkol
items.desc: Web-based school management platform for handling enrollments, classes, and administrative documents, with academic tracking, automated grade calculation, PDF report generation, and a secure portal for parents and teachers.

items.title: Mosi
items.desc: A fintech project currently under development, aimed at modernizing and streamlining financial transactions in the Republic of Congo (Brazzaville).

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a project in mind? An opportunity to share? I'm open to new collaborations and meaningful exchanges.
